button.name: action_create_extra_service_charge_invoice
button.invisible: not extra_service_ids or extra_service_invoice_id != False or status in ['c_return', 'd_cancel']

button.name: action_create_vehicle_payment
button.invisible: status == 'a_draft' or installment_created != False or status == 'd_cancel'

button.name: %(action_return_deposit)d
button.invisible: if_any_deposit == False or deposit_invoice_id == False or status != 'c_return' or return_deposit_invoice_id != False

button.name: create_contract_trip_expense_report
button.invisible: not contract_expense_ids or not is_driver_required or not is_any_trip_expense

field.name: vehicle_id
field.readonly: start_date == False or end_date == False or status != 'a_draft'

button.name: action_approve
button.invisible: nb_attachment == 0 or not can_approve or state != 'submitted'

button.name: action_approve
button.invisible: nb_attachment >= 1 or not can_approve or state != 'submitted'

div.invisible: not is_editable or not product_description or not product_id

field.name: total_amount_currency
field.readonly: not is_editable or not is_multiple_currency or product_has_cost
